---
title: "Welcome"
date: 2026-03-26
description: "First post in the Quarto portfolio."
categories: [meta, quarto]
---

This is your first post. You can write Markdown, LaTeX math like $\beta_1$, and code blocks.

```python
import pandas as pd
print("hello from python")
```

```stata
sysuse auto, clear
reg price mpg weight
```
